name: SEO Bookmarklets for Google Chrome
description: A curated toolkit of one-click bookmarklets for technical SEO audits, on-page analysis, and web-performance inspection.

categories.name: Google Search & Performance Tools
categories.description: Open Google's testing and reporting tools pre-filled with the current page or domain.

items.name: GSC — URLs Containing
items.description: Open the Search Console performance report filtered to the current page with the "URLs containing" filter.
items.note: Requires access to the matching URL-prefix property in Google Search Console.

items.name: GSC — Exact URL
items.description: Open the Search Console performance report filtered to the current page with the "Exact URL" filter.
items.note: Requires access to the matching URL-prefix property in Google Search Console.

items.name: Rich Results Test
items.description: Send the current URL to Google's Rich Results Test.

items.name: AMP Test
items.description: Send the current URL to Google's AMP Test.

items.name: PageSpeed Insights
items.description: Run PageSpeed Insights against the current URL.

items.name: CrUX Report
items.description: Open the Chrome UX Report dashboard for the current domain.

items.name: CrUX Vis Report
items.description: Open the CrUX Vis visualisation for the current origin.

items.name: site: Search
items.description: Run a site: search on Google for the current domain in a new tab.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
categories.description: Inspect the on-page signals that shape how a page is understood and indexed.

items.name: Canonical & Meta Robots
items.description: Show the canonical URL and meta robots directive of the current page.

items.name: Meta Description
items.description: Show the meta description of the current page.

items.name: Title, Description & Keywords
items.description: Show the title tag, meta description, and meta keywords with their character counts.

items.name: Heading Levels
items.description: Label every heading on the page with its tag (h1–h6) so you can audit document outline.

items.name: Image Alt Text
items.description: Overlay the alt attribute of every image directly on the page.

items.name: Tags in Content
items.description:
Count
tags and highlight the 20 characters before and after each one.

items.name: Page Element Overview
items.description: Summarise total elements, resources, page weight, headings, links, CSS/JS, canonical, images and more.

categories.name: Links
categories.description: Visualise and count the internal and external links on a page.

items.name: Highlight Links
items.description: Highlight every anchor element on the page.

items.name: Count Links
items.description: Count all links and colour-code each one with an index attribute.

categories.name: Web Performance
categories.description: Inspect resource hints, script loading, fonts, and <head> ordering.

items.name: Resource Hints (Detail)
items.description: Show the count and URLs of preconnect, dns-prefetch, preload, and prefetch links.

items.name: Resource Hints (List)
items.description: List every resource hint type and whether the page uses it.

items.name: Script Loading Types
items.description: Table every <script src> showing async, defer, module, and render-blocking status.

items.name: Web Fonts in Use
items.description: List the web fonts applied across the page.

items.name: Fonts Above the Fold
items.description: List fonts preloaded, loaded, and actually used above the fold.

items.name: <head> Order (Capo)
items.description: Visualise the order of <head> elements and flag what is out of order. By rviscomi/capo.js.

categories.name: Technical & Privacy
categories.description: Read HTTP response headers and inspect cookies set by the page.

items.name: HTTP Response Headers
items.description: Display the HTTP response headers for the current URL in a modal.

items.name: Cookies (Alert)
items.description: Show all cookies set by the current page in an alert.

items.name: Cookies (Modal)
items.description: Show all cookies set by the current page in a closable modal.

categories.name: Accessibility & Design
categories.description: Inspect typography and colour contrast of selected text.

items.name: Text Font & Contrast
items.description: Show the font-family, size, weight, colour, and contrast ratio of the selected text.

categories.name: Structured Data & Social
categories.description: Inspect schema markup and how the page appears when shared on social platforms.

items.name: Schema / JSON-LD Viewer
items.description: Extract and pretty-print all JSON-LD on the page, list the schema @types found, and open Google's Rich Results Test.

items.name: Social Preview (OG & X)
items.description: Render an Open Graph and X/Twitter card preview from the page's meta tags, flagging missing images or cards.

categories.name: Indexability & Crawl
categories.description: Check whether a page can be indexed and quickly reach the files crawlers rely on.

items.name: Indexability Snapshot
items.description: Combine meta robots, the X-Robots-Tag header, and canonical into a single indexable yes/no verdict.

items.name: GSC URL Inspection
items.description: Open Google Search Console's URL Inspection tool for the exact current page.
items.note: Requires access to the matching property in Google Search Console.

items.name: Open robots.txt
items.description: Open /robots.txt for the current domain.

items.name: Open sitemap.xml
items.description: Open /sitemap.xml for the current domain.

items.name: Open llms.txt
items.description: Open /llms.txt for the current domain (the emerging standard for AI crawlers).

items.name: Wayback Machine
items.description: Open the current URL's archive history on the Internet Archive.

categories.name: Performance — Live Metrics
categories.description: Measure runtime performance directly in the page as it loads and as you interact.

items.name: Core Web Vitals Overlay
items.description: Pin a live LCP / CLS / INP readout to the page, colour-rated against Google's thresholds. Click again to dismiss.

items.name: Render-Blocking Resources
items.description: Find render-blocking CSS and synchronous scripts in the <head> and list them in the Console.
